languages.text: {n}Триасомата замирает, позволяя вам провести осмотр. Вы начинаете обрабатывать раны и места стыка имплантов с плотью антисептическими мазями. Прежде чем вам удается закончить процедуру, мужчина начинает выть и отбрасывает ваши руки, съеживаясь на коленях.{/n}

{n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You begin treating his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, but before you can finish, he starts to howl and shoves your hands away, cowering on his knees.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Триасомата замирает, позволяя вам провести осмотр. Вы начинаете обрабатывать раны и места стыка имплантов с плотью антисептическими мазями. Прежде чем вам удается закончить процедуру, мужчина начинает выть и отбрасывает ваши руки, съеживаясь на коленях.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You begin treating his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, but before you can finish, he starts to howl and shoves your hands away, cowering on his knees.{/n}

{n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You begin treating his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, but before you can finish, he starts to howl and shoves your hands away, cowering on his knees.{/n}

{n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You begin treating his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, but before you can finish, he starts to howl and shoves your hands away, cowering on his knees.{/n}

languages.text: {n}トライアスモータが静まり、彼を調べることができる。傷やインプラントが肉に接する部分を消毒薬で治療するが、治療が終わりそうになると、彼は悲鳴を上げ、手を払い、膝をついて縮み込む。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You begin treating his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, but before you can finish, he starts to howl and shoves your hands away, cowering on his knees.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}トライアスモータが静まり、彼を調べることができる。傷やインプラントが肉に接する部分を消毒薬で治療するが、治療が終わりそうになると、彼は悲鳴を上げ、手を払い、膝をついて縮み込む。{/n}

languages.text: {n}三相体安静了下来，任由你检查。你用消毒药膏处理着伤口，以及植入物与血肉的接合处。但不等你处理完，他就哀嚎起来，推开你的手，蜷缩着跪在地上。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You begin treating his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, but before you can finish, he starts to howl and shoves your hands away, cowering on his knees.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}三相体安静了下来，任由你检查。你用消毒药膏处理着伤口，以及植入物与血肉的接合处。但不等你处理完，他就哀嚎起来，推开你的手，蜷缩着跪在地上。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le Triasomata s'immobilise pour vous permettre de l'examiner. Vous commencez à appliquer des onguents antiseptiques sur ses blessures et les jonctions entre les implants et la chair, mais avant que vous ne puissiez terminer, il se met à hurler et vous pousse, puis se recroqueville sur ses genoux.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You begin treating his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, but before you can finish, he starts to howl and shoves your hands away, cowering on his knees.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le Triasomata s'immobilise pour vous permettre de l'examiner. Vous commencez à appliquer des onguents antiseptiques sur ses blessures et les jonctions entre les implants et la chair, mais avant que vous ne puissiez terminer, il se met à hurler et vous pousse, puis se recroqueville sur ses genoux.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El triasómata se queda inmóvil, lo que te permite examinarlo. Empiezas a tratar sus heridas y los puntos donde los implantes se unen a la carne con ungüentos antisépticos, pero, antes de que termines, empieza a aullar y aparta tus manos para abrazarse las rodillas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You begin treating his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, but before you can finish, he starts to howl and shoves your hands away, cowering on his knees.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El triasómata se queda inmóvil, lo que te permite examinarlo. Empiezas a tratar sus heridas y los puntos donde los implantes se unen a la carne con ungüentos antisépticos, pero, antes de que termines, empieza a aullar y aparta tus manos para abrazarse las rodillas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Üçyeköz, hareketsiz kalıp onu incelemene izin veriyor. Yaralarını ve implantın etle birleştiği yerleri antiseptik merhemlerle tedavi iyi etmeye başlıyorsun fakat sen işini bitiremeden ulumaya başlıyor ve ellerini iterek dizlerinin üzerine çöküyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You begin treating his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, but before you can finish, he starts to howl and shoves your hands away, cowering on his knees.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Üçyeköz, hareketsiz kalıp onu incelemene izin veriyor. Yaralarını ve implantın etle birleştiği yerleri antiseptik merhemlerle tedavi iyi etmeye başlıyorsun fakat sen işini bitiremeden ulumaya başlıyor ve ellerini iterek dizlerinin üzerine çöküyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Triasomata verstummt und lässt zu, dass du ihn untersuchst. Du behandelst seine Wunden und die Stellen, an denen Implantate auf Fleisch treffen, mit antiseptischen Salben, als er plötzlich ein Heulen ausstößt, deine Hände wegschlägt und auf die Knie sinkt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Triasomata goes still, allowing you to examine him. You begin treating his wounds and the places where implant meets flesh with antiseptic ointments, but before you can finish, he starts to howl and shoves your hands away, cowering on his knees.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Triasomata verstummt und lässt zu, dass du ihn untersuchst. Du behandelst seine Wunden und die Stellen, an denen Implantate auf Fleisch treffen, mit antiseptischen Salben, als er plötzlich ein Heulen ausstößt, deine Hände wegschlägt und auf die Knie sinkt.{/n}
